title: cleophora commersonii
intro: Cleophora commersonii, commonly known as the 'Senna', is a flowering plant in the legume family. The Senna plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating constipation and other digestive issues, due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Cleophora commersonii include relief from symptoms such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to help with weight loss. The herbal preparations of Cleophora commersonii are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and regular bowel movements.
